creator: sudakov@sibptus.tomsk.ru
text:
This problem still persists on 8.1-RELEASE with the following card:

puc0@pci0:3:1:0:        class=0x070002 card=0x00041000 chip=0x98459710
rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'MosChip Semiconductors (Was: Netmos Technology)'
    device     = '4 serial, 1 parallel port PCI card (NM9845CV)'
    class      = simple comms
    subclass   = UART
